Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/d87eb0cf5a954b20179a1e3e05b2c5d280a63b3b97dcd737fbbbc7187c95db49/8a63a5c5-4e6c-46d7-b80c-ccdaac9fa219/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
